session.user:
Run pytest on the implement command test files and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors, just report what passes and fails.
Run: pytest tests/commands/implement/ -v
Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run pytest on the implement command test files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on implement command tests with verbose output
